authTwitterUser.heading_zh: 关联 X/Twitter 账号 authTwitterUser
authTwitterUser.desc_en: Start the OAuth flow that links a user's X/Twitter account to your AIsa API key, returning an authorization URL for the user to approve. Once linked, AIsa reuses that session automatically for every subsequent Twitter write call.
authTwitterUser.description_zh: 发起 OAuth 流程，把用户的 X/Twitter 账号关联到你的 AIsa API Key，返回供用户授权的链接。关联完成后，AIsa 会在后续每次 Twitter 写操作中自动复用该会话。

unlikeTwitter.desc_en: Remove the authenticated source user's like from a tweet. Unliking a tweet that was never liked is a no-op and still succeeds.
unlikeTwitter.description_zh: 移除已授权来源用户对某条推文的点赞。对本就未点赞的推文取消点赞是空操作，仍会成功。

likeTwitter.desc_en: Like a tweet on behalf of the authenticated source user. Liking an already-liked tweet is a no-op and still succeeds.
likeTwitter.description_zh: 代表已授权来源用户点赞某条推文。对已点赞的推文再次点赞是空操作，仍会成功。

postTwitter.desc_en: Publish a new tweet on behalf of the authenticated source user, or edit an existing one. At most one of `media`, `poll`, `quote_tweet_id`, and `card_uri` may be set in a single request.
postTwitter.description_zh: 代表已授权来源用户发布新推文，或编辑已有推文。media、poll、quote_tweet_id、card_uri 在同一次请求中至多只能设置其一。

unfollowTwitterUser.desc_en: Make the authenticated source user unfollow a target user on X/Twitter. Unfollowing someone not currently followed is a no-op and still succeeds.
unfollowTwitterUser.description_zh: 让已授权来源用户取消关注 X/Twitter 上的目标用户。取消关注本就未关注的用户是空操作，仍会成功。

followTwitterUser.desc_en: Make the authenticated source user follow a target user on X/Twitter. Following a protected account yields a pending follow request awaiting approval.
followTwitterUser.description_zh: 让已授权来源用户关注 X/Twitter 上的目标用户。关注受保护账号时会产生待对方批准的关注请求。

scopes.desc_en: X OAuth 2.0 scopes to request for the link; omit to use the default set covering all of AIsa's Twitter write endpoints.
scopes.title_zh: 本次关联要申请的 X OAuth 2.0 权限范围；省略则使用覆盖 AIsa 全部 Twitter 写接口的默认集合。

auth_url.desc_en: Short-lived X authorization URL; open it in a browser so the source user can approve the requested scopes. Generate a fresh one each time a (re-)link is needed.
auth_url.title_zh: 有效期短的 X 授权链接；在浏览器打开它，让来源用户批准所申请的权限。每次需要（重新）关联都应重新生成。

state.desc_en: Opaque CSRF token AIsa validates when X redirects back; store it client-side if you need to correlate the flow.
state.title_zh: 用于防 CSRF 的不透明令牌，X 回跳时 AIsa 会校验它；若需关联本次流程可在客户端保存。

expires_at.desc_en: When the authorization URL stops working; request a new one if the user hasn't finished authorizing by then.
expires_at.title_zh: 授权链接失效的时间；用户若未在此前完成授权需重新申请。

tweet_id.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet to unlike.
tweet_id.title_zh: 要取消点赞的推文标识。

data.desc_en: Container for the resulting like state.

data.liked.desc_en: Whether the source user currently likes the tweet; `false` confirms the like was removed.
data.liked.title_zh: 来源用户当前是否仍点赞该推文；为 false 表示点赞已移除。

tweet_id.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet to like.

data.desc_en: Container for the resulting like state.

data.liked.desc_en: Whether the source user currently likes the tweet; `true` confirms the like is in place.
data.liked.title_zh: 来源用户当前是否点赞该推文；为 true 表示已点赞。

text.desc_en: Body text of the tweet; optional when posting media, a poll, or a quote, otherwise required.
text.title_zh: 推文正文；发布媒体、投票或引用时可省略，否则必填。

reply.desc_en: Settings that turn this tweet into a reply to another tweet.
reply.title_zh: 把本推文设为对另一条推文回复的相关设置。

reply.in_reply_to_tweet_id.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet being replied to.

reply.auto_populate_reply_metadata.desc_en: Whether to automatically @-mention the participants of the original tweet in the reply.
reply.auto_populate_reply_metadata.title_zh: 是否在回复中自动 @ 原推文的参与者。

reply.exclude_reply_user_ids.desc_en: User IDs to leave out of the auto-generated reply mentions.
reply.exclude_reply_user_ids.title_zh: 从自动生成的回复 @ 名单中排除的用户 ID。

quote_tweet_id.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet to quote; mutually exclusive with `media`, `poll`, and `card_uri`.
quote_tweet_id.title_zh: 要引用的推文标识；与 media、poll、card_uri 互斥。

media.desc_en: Attaches uploaded media to the tweet; mutually exclusive with `poll`, `quote_tweet_id`, and `card_uri`.
media.title_zh: 为推文附加上传的媒体；与 poll、quote_tweet_id、card_uri 互斥。

media.media_ids.desc_en: Identifiers of media to attach, obtained beforehand from X's media-upload API.
media.media_ids.title_zh: 要附加的媒体标识，需事先通过 X 的媒体上传接口获取。

media.tagged_user_ids.desc_en: User IDs to tag in the attached media.
media.tagged_user_ids.title_zh: 在所附媒体中标记的用户 ID。

poll.desc_en: Attaches a poll to the tweet; mutually exclusive with `media`, `quote_tweet_id`, and `card_uri`.
poll.title_zh: 为推文附加投票；与 media、quote_tweet_id、card_uri 互斥。

poll.duration_minutes.desc_en: How long the poll stays open, in minutes.
poll.duration_minutes.title_zh: 投票开放的时长，单位为分钟。

poll.reply_settings.desc_en: Restricts who may reply to the tweet that carries this poll.
poll.reply_settings.title_zh: 限制谁可以回复这条带投票的推文。

card_uri.desc_en: URI of a card to attach; mutually exclusive with `media`, `poll`, `quote_tweet_id`, and `direct_message_deep_link`.
card_uri.title_zh: 要附加的卡片 URI；与 media、poll、quote_tweet_id、direct_message_deep_link 互斥。

direct_message_deep_link.desc_en: Deep link that routes the conversation into a private direct message.
direct_message_deep_link.title_zh: 将对话引导进入私信的深度链接。

geo.desc_en: Attaches a place to the tweet.

geo.place_id.desc_en: Identifier of the X place to attach.
geo.place_id.title_zh: 要附加的 X 地点标识。

reply_settings.desc_en: Restricts who is allowed to reply to the tweet.
reply_settings.title_zh: 限制谁可以回复该推文。

for_super_followers_only.desc_en: Whether to make the tweet visible only to super followers.
for_super_followers_only.title_zh: 是否让该推文仅对超级粉丝可见。

nullcast.desc_en: Whether to post as a nullcast (promoted-only) tweet that does not appear in the public timeline or to followers.
nullcast.title_zh: 是否发布为 nullcast（仅推广）推文，不出现在公开时间线或粉丝处。

paid_partnership.desc_en: Whether to mark the tweet as a paid partnership.
paid_partnership.title_zh: 是否将该推文标记为付费合作。

made_with_ai.desc_en: Whether to flag the tweet as containing AI-generated media.
made_with_ai.title_zh: 是否标记该推文含 AI 生成的媒体。

community_id.desc_en: Identifier of the community to post into.

share_with_followers.desc_en: Whether to also surface the community post to your followers.
share_with_followers.title_zh: 是否同时把社区帖子展示给你的粉丝。

edit_options.desc_en: Switches the call to edit an existing tweet rather than create a new one, subject to X's edit window.
edit_options.title_zh: 将本次调用切换为编辑已有推文而非新建，受 X 的编辑时限约束。

edit_options.previous_post_id.desc_en: Identifier of the existing tweet to edit.
edit_options.previous_post_id.title_zh: 要编辑的已有推文标识。

data.desc_en: Container for the created or edited tweet.
data.title_zh: 已创建或已编辑推文的容器。

data.text.desc_en: Final text of the tweet as stored by X.
data.text.title_zh: X 实际保存的推文最终文本。

target_user_id.desc_en: Identifier of the X/Twitter user to unfollow.
target_user_id.title_zh: 要取消关注的 X/Twitter 用户标识。

data.desc_en: Container for the resulting follow state.

data.following.desc_en: Whether the source user still follows the target; `false` confirms the unfollow.
data.following.title_zh: 来源用户是否仍关注目标用户；为 false 表示已取消关注。

target_user_id.desc_en: Identifier of the X/Twitter user to follow.
target_user_id.title_zh: 要关注的 X/Twitter 用户标识。

data.desc_en: Container for the resulting follow state.

data.following.desc_en: Whether the source user now follows the target user.
data.following.title_zh: 来源用户当前是否已关注目标用户。

data.pending_follow.desc_en: Whether a follow request was sent to a protected account and is awaiting the target's approval.
data.pending_follow.title_zh: 是否已向受保护账号发出关注请求并等待对方批准。
